alignments.candidate_evidence: Advanced Excel and Google Sheets; proficient SQL with joins, GROUP BY, subqueries, CTEs, window functions; builds Looker dashboards; writes BigQuery queries to pull and shape own data
alignments.job_requirement: Build tools and analytics—including dashboards, queries, and custom data reports—to support user business reviews and operational needs

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google scaling global commercial operations; cross-functional stakeholder management and revenue operations experience; partnered with engineering on Salesforce feature requests
alignments.job_requirement: Collaborate with Sales, Solution Architecture, and Implementation teams to drive user engagement and commercial outcomes

alignments.candidate_evidence: Designs, specs, and directs LLM coding agents to build production systems; product transformation and requirements ownership; UAT and rollout leadership
alignments.job_requirement: Work closely with Product and Engineering to proactively surface potential enhancements and new features based on field feedback

gaps.gap: 4+ years software engineering or integration engineering role: candidate has zero production software-engineering background and no native integration engineering experience
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has eight years scaling global commercial operations and transformation; product ownership and requirements logic design; direction of LLM coding agents. However, this does not substitute for hands-on software engineering or client-facing integration delivery roles.

gaps.gap: Ability to write and debug code in Go, Java, C/C++, or similar: candidate has basic Python actively learning, not professional proficiency in required languages
gaps.mitigation: Candidate can query and shape data with SQL and BigQuery; basic Python; direction of LLM agents. Insufficient to lead hands-on keyboard implementations or debug production user code in Go/Java/C++.

gaps.gap: Code-level debugging (Stripe and user code) and using code as a problem-solving tool: candidate has no demonstrated production debugging experience
gaps.mitigation: Candidate directs LLM agents and owns evaluation methodology; does not have hands-on debugging track record for integration or infrastructure issues.

gaps.gap: Customer-facing technical or solutions engineering role: candidate's experience is internal operations and product transformation, not external client advisory or troubleshooting
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has stakeholder management and cross-functional leadership; does not have proven track record leading technical conversations with external enterprise customers or resolving their integration issues.

gaps.gap: Payments domain expertise and API security principles: no evidence of payments, fintech, or API security background
gaps.mitigation: Candidate can learn domain; however, role requires understanding of payments domain and API security as a minimum requirement, not preferred.

hard_blockers.evidence: Minimum requirements: '4+ years of experience in a software engineering or integration engineering role' and 'Ability to write and debug code in languages such as Go, Java, C/C++, or similar' and 'Comfortable with code-level debugging (both Stripe and user code) and using code as a practical problem-solving tool'. Candidate has zero production software-engineering background, basic Python actively learning, and no integration engineering experience. These are explicit minimum requirements stated as non-negotiable entry criteria.

output.level_rationale: Role requires 4+ years software engineering or integration engineering (L4 anchor), customer-facing technical advisory, hands-on keyboard implementations, and code-level debugging of production systems. These responsibilities and skill demands map to established L5 professional-services or field-engineering scope at a mature fintech/payments platform. Company size (Stripe, mature) and EMEA delivery team structure reinforce L5 estimate.
output.summary: Integration Engineer (Client-facing) at Stripe is a customer-facing technical delivery and advisory role requiring 4+ years hands-on software engineering or integration engineering, proficiency in Go/Java/C++, code-level debugging, payments domain knowledge, and strategic technical conversations with enterprise users. Candidate has strong data/analytics and dashboarding skills (SQL, BigQuery, Looker) and commercial operations leadership, but lacks production software-engineering background, required language proficiency, integration engineering experience, and customer-facing technical advisory track record. Role family fit is out of scope (pure technical delivery, not strategy/operations); hard blockers on minimum engineering requirements disqualify.
uncertainties: Candidate's LLM agent direction and evaluation methodology ownership may indicate some systems-thinking about code and debugging, but extent of hands-on technical depth is unclear from profile
Payments domain exposure through commercial operations or product work not mentioned; learning curve unclear
Professional services team structure and peer-level technical anchors at Stripe not stated in JD
Whether advanced SQL/BigQuery proficiency could partially offset missing Go/Java/C++ for initial engagements is unclear, but JD frames code-level debugging as minimum
